name: paytm-wallet-end-to-end-peer
description: Concurrent peer-to-peer wallet backend with Express, Next.js, Redis, PostgreSQL row-level locking, OpenAPI SDK generation, and Nginx deployment.
author: Milan <milansmbp@gmail.com>

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @wallet/openapi-client && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @wallet/api" "npm run dev --workspace @wallet/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @wallet/openapi-client && npm run build --workspace @wallet/api && npm run build --workspace @wallet/web
scripts.deploy:local: npm run compose:up && npm run health
